default.title: Horizon Tech | Enterprise Software, Cloud, uye AI
default.description: Horizon Tech inogadzira uye inoendesa software yebhizinesi, AI mhinduro, gore zvivakwa, uye zvigadzirwa zvemadhijitari zvezvikwata zvine chido.

home.title: Horizon Tech | Engineering Systems That Scale
home.description: Enterprise software, AI / ML, gore zvivakwa, uye IoT kuendesa kwezvikwata zvepasirese.

about.title: Nezve Horizon Tech | Basa rekambani uye timu
about.description: Dzidza nezve Horizon Tech, basa redu, uye nemabatiro atinoita zvigadzirwa zvepamusoro-soro.

team.title: Chikwata | Horizon Tech Hutungamiriri uye Nyanzvi
team.description: Sangana nemainjiniya nevatungamiriri vanovaka software yebhizinesi uye gore mapuratifomu kuHorizon Tech.

careers.title: Mabasa | Vaka neHorizon Tech
careers.description: Tsvaga mabasa akavhurika uye kukura basa rako neHorizon Tech's timu yeinjiniya.

contact.title: Contact Horizon Tech | Tanga Chirongwa Chako
contact.description: Taura neHorizon Tech kuti ukurukure chirongwa chako, zvido zvehunyanzvi, uye nguva yekuendesa.

caseStudies.title: Case Studies | Horizon Tech Mhedzisiro
caseStudies.description: Verenga nyaya dzevatengi uye mhedzisiro yakaunzwa neHorizon Tech mumaindasitiri ese.

blog.title: Blog | Horizon Tech Insights
blog.description: Ruzivo rwehunyanzvi, zvidzidzo zvekuendesa, uye nhungamiro yekuvaka kubva kuHorizon Tech.

education.title: Dzidzo | Horizon Tech Kudzidza Zviwanikwa
education.description: Nhungamiro, mareferenzi, uye zviwanikwa zvekudzidza zvehunyanzvi kubva kuHorizon Tech.

support.title: Tsigiro | Horizon Tech
support.description: Tora rutsigiro zviwanikwa uye sarudzo dzekutaurirana dzeHorizon Tech masevhisi.

privacy.title: Yakavanzika Policy | Horizon Tech
privacy.description: Verenga Horizon Tech's Privacy Policy uye kuzvipira kwekuchengetedza data.

terms.title: Terms of Service | Horizon Tech
terms.description: Verenga iyo Horizon Tech mazwi ebasa kune webhusaiti yedu uye masevhisi.

profile.title: Profile | Horizon Tech
profile.description: Gadzirisa yako Horizon Tech chimiro, marongero, uye ruzivo rweakaundi.

firstTimeSetup.title: Kutanga-Nguva Setup | Horizon Tech
firstTimeSetup.description: Yakazara nzira kuchinyorwa: Linux Vakapindwa muropa » General » Noticias » Yakazara nzira kuchinyorwa: Linux Vakapindwa muropa » General » Noticias »

forgotPassword.title: Vakakanganwa Password | Horizon Tech
forgotPassword.description: Dzoreredza mukana kune yako Horizon Tech account.

resetPassword.title: Reset password | Horizon Tech
resetPassword.description: Gadzira password nyowani yeHorizon Tech account.

confirmEmail.title: Confirm Email | Horizon Tech
confirmEmail.description: Simbisa yako email kero kuti ushandise yako Horizon Tech account.

admin.title: Admin Panel | Horizon Tech
admin.description: Administration workspace for Horizon Tech platform management.

unauthorized.title: Hazvina mvumo | Horizon Tech
unauthorized.description: Parizvino iwe hauna mukana wekuwana iyi Horizon Tech peji.

services.title: Services | Horizon Tech
services.description: Ongorora Horizon Tech masevhisi mune software engineering, AI, gore, DevOps, uye shanduko yedhijitari.

innovationLab.title: Innovation Lab | Horizon Tech
innovationLab.description: Ona Horizon Tech kuedza uye prototypes muAI uye yakashandiswa mainjiniya.

authCallback.title: Kusaina | Horizon Tech
authCallback.description: Kupedzisa yakachengeteka kusaina kune yako Horizon Tech account.
